name: selector_variant_evidence
description: Selected evidence per candidate per selector variant (8 variants: raw_top1_chunk, cleaned_top1_chunk, first_sentence_top1, best_sentence_top1_overlap, best_sentence_top5_overlap, three_sentence_window_top5, sentence_bm25_top1, window_bm25_top1). Public redacted version (selector_examples_redacted.csv) MUST NOT contain selected_evidence.

redaction_rules.selected_evidence: DROP entirely from public release; selected_evidence_sha256 retained for traceability
redaction_rules.selected_source_unit_id: DROP from public redacted file (corpus-internal identifier)
redaction_rules.target_candidate_group_id: DROP from public redacted file (group identifier)
